protocol.name: AIMS/SPIFFE Workload Identity Authentication
protocol.description: Agent Identity and Messaging System (AIMS) uses SPIFFE workload identity with X.509 SVIDs for mTLS-based authentication, binding agent identity to infrastructure.

entities.name: OAIAF Agent
entities.description: AI agent using OAIAF framework with AIMSProvider

entities.name: SPIRE Agent
entities.description: Local SPIRE agent providing workload identity via Workload API

entities.name: Authorization Server
entities.description: OAuth server accepting SPIFFE SVIDs for token exchange

entities.name: Resource Server
entities.description: Protected API accepting mTLS or bearer token authentication

phases.name: SVID Acquisition
phases.description: Agent obtains X.509 SVID from SPIRE Workload API

phases.name: Token Exchange
phases.description: Agent exchanges SVID for access token via mTLS

phases.name: Resource Access
phases.description: Agent accesses resource with SPIFFE identity

flows.label:
FetchX509SVID()
via Workload API socket
flows.description: Agent requests X.509 SVID from local SPIRE agent via Unix socket

annotations.text: Connection authenticated by kernel (Unix socket credentials)

flows.label:
Workload Attestation
(PID, namespace, container)
flows.description: SPIRE agent attests the calling workload using configured attestor

flows.label:
X.509 SVID + Trust Bundle
SPIFFE ID: spiffe://example.com/agent/x
flows.description: SPIRE agent returns short-lived X.509 certificate with SPIFFE ID in URI SAN

flows.label:
POST /token (mTLS)
grant_type=token-exchange
subject_token_type=svid
flows.description: Agent requests token using mTLS with SVID as client certificate

security.description: SVID presented as mTLS client certificate

flows.label:
Validate SVID
- Verify certificate chain
- Check SPIFFE ID format
- Match registration
flows.description: Auth server validates SVID against trust bundle and checks agent registration

annotations.text: SPIFFE ID extracted from certificate URI SAN

flows.label:
200 OK
{access_token, token_type, scope}
flows.description: Auth server returns access token bound to SPIFFE ID

flows.label:
GET /api/resource (mTLS)
Authorization: Bearer {token}
flows.description: Agent accesses resource using mTLS + bearer token (defense in depth)

security.description: Both mTLS and bearer token for defense in depth

flows.label:
Validate mTLS + Token
Match SPIFFE IDs
flows.description: Resource server validates both certificate SPIFFE ID and token claims match

annotations.text: SPIFFE ID in certificate must match token sub claim
